_instructions: Copy this file and rename to <your-area>.json. Fill in your OCV URL, categories, and feature tags. See accounts.json for a complete example.
name: Your Area Name
description: Brief description of what this config covers

entity._instructions: Optional. Define if you want to identify a specific entity (e.g., ISP provider, feature name) from the data. Remove this section if not needed.

categories._instructions: Define issue buckets. Each category has: match (keywords that trigger it), require (additional keywords that must ALSO be present, optional), exclude (keywords that disqualify, optional). All patterns are regex. The first matching category wins.

feature_tags: _instructions: List OCV CustomTags that are meaningful for your area. Everything else is dropped.
noise_patterns: _instructions: Regex patterns for feedback that should be flagged as noise (competitive comparisons, off-topic, etc.)
